**Language:** English | [Deutsch](documentation.de.md)

## Note
English is preferred, but German is also accepted.

## Affected document or section
Which file/section is affected?

## What is unclear, missing, or incorrect
Describe the problem in the current documentation.

## Suggested improvement
What change would make this documentation better?

## Additional context
Add links, screenshots, examples, or related issues/PRs if helpful.
